CustomField.formula: XAccreditations_Fitting_Air_Ground_HP__c + XAccreditations_Fitting_Insulation__c + XAccreditations_Fitting_Other_Retrofit__c + XAccreditations_Fitting_Solar_PV_Therma__c + XAccreditations_Another_Related_Accred__c + XAccreditations_PAS_2035_Trustmark__c + XAccreditations_Retrofit_Assess_Design__c + XAccreditations_Retrofit_Project_Mgmt__c
CustomField.label: Total Number of Accreditations
